case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. ALLEGHENY CASUALTY COMPANY

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: REAL PARTY IN INTEREST DAD'S BAIL BONDS MOTION TO VACATE SUMMARY JUDGMENT, VACATE FORFEITURE AND EXONERATE BOND WAS GRANTED. PURSUANT TO PLAINTIFF'S NOTICE OF NON-OPPOSITION. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR # 8600
NTC OF MOTION, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY REAL PARTY IN INTEREST DAD'S BAIL BONDS HEARING SET FOR APR-11-2007 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALLEGHENY CASUALTY COMPANY $52,100.00 PRINCIPAL, $335.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $52,435.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-11-2007 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
